intent: Launch the app, navigate to Probe, observe live GPU telemetry stream, expand a device row.

keyframes.caption: App window appears, sidebar highlights Probe; main pane still blank while telemetry subscription opens.
First telemetry row animates in - GPU 0, VRAM 41.2 / 48.0 GB, utilisation 63%, sparkline starts drawing.
Live stream fills 4 device rows; utilisation sparkline rolls smoothly, temp climbs 58C to 64C over ~5s.
Cursor hovers GPU 0 row, highlight ring appears; status pill flips from 'streaming' to 'selected'.
Row expands: per-process breakdown table slides down, shows 3 CUDA ctx entries, power budget bar at 72%.
Final frame with detail panel fully open, live values still ticking in header while expanded view stays pinned.

title: Probe live telemetry watch

verification.note: Placeholder artefacts - real recording pending on user Mac (Accessibility + Screen Recording permission required)
